audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with no significant background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: A man in a dark suit and striped tie stands in a dimly lit hallway, looking around cautiously. Behind him, another man is partially visible. The camera pans right, revealing a tiled wall with framed pictures and a red diamond-shaped decoration. As the camera continues to move, more men appear, standing in a line facing forward. They are dressed in dark clothing, with one older man in a light gray suit standing slightly ahead of the others. All individuals maintain a still posture, with their gazes directed forward, and the scene is illuminated by a single overhead light.
